ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-14-2010 Continued To Sep-15-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff. Defendant Rachel E. Lewis, appearing on her own behalf. The OSC is re-set to 9/15/2010 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)

Notice Of Demurrer; Demurrer To Pltf'S Complaint; Memorandum Of P/A
Off Calendar Aug-17-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT RACHEL LEWIS' DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT is off calendar. Proof of service fails to demonstrate personal knowledge that moving papers were deposited in Fed Ex box, other facility maintained by Fed Ex, or delivered to authorized courier. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Aug-05-2009 Denied
